## 📜 Documentation / Grimoire Update — The PR Inquisition

### Summary

<!-- What documentation does this PR add or update? -->

### 📚 Changes

- [ ] Architecture documentation updated
- [ ] Mission / roadmap updated
- [ ] Contributing guide updated
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Inline code documentation / comments updated
- [ ] Learning artifacts (README.md with examples) added to a subsystem

### Accuracy Check

- [ ] All file paths and project names referenced are correct
- [ ] Code examples compile and are syntactically valid
- [ ] Links to other documents are not broken

> _"If it cannot be taught, it is not finished."_
